event_info: short of a length outside off; shaping into the batter slightly; Pathum Nissanka goes for a cut and misses
drifting on the pads; Pathum Nissanka clips it through the on-side and opens his account with a single
yorker length ball around off; KL Rahul digs it out into the off-side
first boundary of the match! Tad short on leg; Pathum Nissanka flicks it away to the fine leg fence with nonchalance
fraction short outside off; Pathum Nissanka plays this late; steering it to third man for one
good length delivery outside off; KL Rahul steers it towards backward point for one
Xavier Bartlett concedes a boundary off the first ball. On a length outside off; KL Rahul plays it off the front foot; putting it away to the deep backward point fence

back-to-back boundaries! Length delivery around off; shaping away from the batter; KL Rahul whips it over wide long-on and that's another boundary added to the total. An attacking approach by Rahul so far
tad slow around off; holds its line as KL Rahul knocks it into the off-side for one
hint of away movement; it's a length delivery around off; Pathum Nissanka drives it to mid-off for a single
quick single taken. On a length around middle and leg; clipped towards mid-on with soft hands as KL Rahul scampers across to the other end
good shot! Picks the length nicely; rocks back in the crease and pulls this away to deep backward square leg fence. On the bounce and over the boundary. Xavier Bartlett goes for 15 runs in the over
back of a length delivery around off; shapes back in as KL Rahul knocks it down the pitch

would you believe it? Shashank Singh has put down yet another catch. He dropped many catches in the previous match as well. KL Rahul had pulled the short ball towards deep square leg where Shashank tried to reverse cup it. Arshdeep Singh looks disappointed and so does PBKS owner - Preity Zinta
tad short around middle and leg; KL Rahul clips it towards the on-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Prabhsimran Singh!! Top edge and he's gone. Short and quick around off
event_info: Pathum Nissanka goes for a pull and the top edge has been taken by the keeper. Rahul was dropped two balls back; but Nissanka's catch has been taken. He doesn't get a second chance. Pathum Nissanka c Prabhsimran Singh b Arshdeep Singh 11(7) [4s-2]
full and quick around middle and leg; Nitish Rana flicks it towards fine leg for a single
pulled away! Tad short around middle and leg; KL Rahul rocks back and pulls it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen. First six of the match
slower length delivery around middle and leg; clipped towards mid-wicket by Nitish Rana
flicked away! Easy pickings. This was a full toss on the pads and Nitish Rana flicked it away to the fine leg fence. First boundary of the innings for Rana

back-to-back boundaries. Short and wide outside off; Nitish Rana cuts it towards square third man where the fielder tries to stop it; but he slips in the process; gifting away a boundary. Think Priyansh Arya was the fielder on that occasion
short of a length outside off; steered through point for a couple of runs
pitched up by the bowler around off; squeezed to mid-off by Nitish Rana
on a length around off; Nitish Rana steers it towards short third man
low full toss around middle and leg; KL Rahul drives it to long-on for one
pitched up by the bowler around off; driven to covers by Nitish Rana

cracking cover drive! Vijaykumar Vyshak goes full outside off; a half-volley in the slot and Nitish Rana drills it through covers for a rollicking boundary. He's dealing in boundaries and looking in sublime touch. Played a rollicking knock in the previous match as well

not a great day in the field for the Punjab Kings. Shashank Singh the culprit again. Nitish Rana plays a square drive and Shashank Singh sprints across to his right; tries to stop it with a dive; misses and gives away a boundary
pitched up by the bowler outside off; driven through the off-side for one
that's a juicy full toss on leg; KL Rahul helps it on its way over the fine leg boundary. Delhi Capitals have raced away to 61 in 5 overs. Vijaykumar Vyshak concedes 16 runs in the over
clipped towards mid-on by Nitish Rana for a single
beaten outside off it's shaping away from the batter
worked towards the leg-side by KL Rahul for a single
nudged towards the leg-side for a single by Nitish Rana
pulled away! On the shorter side around middle and leg; KL Rahul rocks back in the crease and pulls it away to the deep mid-wicket fence. He is striking the ball well today
back of a length around middle and leg; KL Rahul knocks it down the pitch; got cramped for room on that occasion
tossed up delivery around middle and leg; driven to long-on for a single
KL Rahul moves into the 40s! A tossed up delivery around off; KL Rahul stands tall and launches it over long-on for half-a-dozen. Chahal taken to the cleaners
clipped towards the on-side by KL Rahul for a single
drifting on the pads; Nitish Rana flicks it through square leg for a single
50-run stand up! This was tad short and KL Rahul nudged it to long-on for one
slower through the air on leg; Nitish Rana nudges it with soft hands to mid-wicket
short of a length around middle and leg; clipped towards the on-side by KL Rahul for a single

another misfield. Short and wide outside off; Nitish Rana cuts it towards backward point where a fumble by the fielder results in four more. He tried to recover and chase it; however; wasn't able to stop it as the ball dribbled away
on the shorter side; Nitish Rana pulls it through mid-wicket for a single
Xavier Bartlett goes short and KL Rahul pulls it towards mid-wicket for a single
yorker length ball on off; Nitish Rana squeezes it to long-off for a single
low full toss on leg; KL Rahul flicks it towards deep mid-wicket for a single
tad short on middle and leg; KL Rahul drags it through mid-wicket
loopy delivery outside off; driven to wide long-off for a couple of runs
flighted delivery on leg; Nitish Rana sweeps it through backward square leg
swept through mid-wicket as Yuzvendra Chahal tosses it up
down the wicket to nudge this away towards the on-side
skids along the deck on leg; KL Rahul clips it through mid-wicket

KL Rahul brings up his fifty! Back of a length delivery around middle and leg; KL Rahul clips it through the on-side for a couple of runs. Gets to his milestone and gets a loud cheer from the home fans. Will be interesting to see how many more runs he adds; has looked in good touch today
chance; but this one hits the bowler on the shin. KL Rahul had chipped it back to Vijaykumar Vyshak; and he tries to grab it in his followthrough. The ball hits his shin and rolls away though
worked away towards the on-side for a single
short and wide outside off; slapped to cover by Nitish Rana
slapped towards extra cover where the fielder tries to grab it; misfields and allows a single

stand and deliver! Pitched up by Vijaykumar Vyshak; this was right into the slot and KL Rahul lofts it over the bowler's head with a straight face of his willow. Couldn't have placed it any straighter. Holds his pose for the cameras too. 100 up for DC
tossed up delivery on leg; Nitish Rana squeezes it towards long-on
1 run; loopy delivery on middle and leg; squeezed to long-on by KL Rahul. Free-hit coming up as it was a no-ball by Yuzvendra Chahal
just a single from the free-hit. Bowls a low full toss as Nitish Rana squeezes it past the bowler. Should have smashed it with more power
KL Rahul advances down the wicket and thumps this floated delivery over the bowler as the ball races away to the fence. Yuzvendra Chahal got away with the free-hit; but he couldn't escape this one
still striking at more than 200. KL Rahul jumps out of his crease and smashes it past the bowler for four more. The umpire does well to get out of its way
short and wide outside off; spinning away from the batter; KL Rahul goes for a cut and misses
loopy delivery outside off; spinning away from the batter who leaves it alone
runs coming thick and fast. This was on the shorter side; Nitish Rana picks the length early and pulls it over deep mid-wicket. There was a fielder in the deep; but this cleared him comfortably

more runs for Rana. Nitish Rana shuffles across in the crease and scoops this towards short fine leg. Chahal was in awkward position while stopping that. Gets his hands and tries to push the ball away; but it races away to the boundary eventually

back-to-back fifties for Nitish Rana! He shuffles across in the crease and scoops the length delivery away to the fine leg fence. Has been a solid knock and has put Delhi Capitals in a strong position

make it a hat-trick of boundaries. This wasn't a convincing shot; but the batsman wouldn't mind it. This was on the shorter side; Nitish Rana goes for a pull and the top edge flies right over the keeper's head
4;4;4;4. A full toss outside off; Nitish Rana gets hold of it and thumps it over the infield at covers for the fourth consecutive boundary of the over. He's on a roll

that six is an icing on the cake. 28 runs from that Xavier Bartlett over. 6;4;4;4;4;6. This was pitched up by the bowler outside off; was in the slot and Nitish Rana bludgeoned it over deep extra cover for a flat six. Even his strike rate is more than 200 after that over
starts off with a wide ball outside off; left alone
Marcus Stoinis goes short and KL Rahul pulls it through deep mid-wicket as the fielder stops it in the deep
114.7 clicks; Nitish Rana drags the short ball through mid-wicket

sensational batting for both of them. They are smashing the PBKS bowlers today. This was full and wide outside off; KL Rahul frees his arms and bludgeons it over deep extra cover for half-a-dozen. 150 up for DC
goes wide outside off and misses the tramline
a slower delivery outside off; KL Rahul swings and misses
widish delivery but just inside the tramline this time; not called a wide
pitched up by the bowler outside off; KL Rahul drills it through covers for a single
KL is on the move tday; full and at the stumps; nothing wrong from Arshdeep - but KL gets into a great position; reverses the stance and scoops it over the keeper's head for a boundary
thumped; fuller length delivery and well wide of off; but it's right in the slot and allows KL a free swing of the bat; he swipes and clears long-off with utmost ease

smashed; this is turning out to be a boundary hitting competition at the moment; was the attempted slower ball from Arshdeep; but it simply sat up and was disdainfully hammered back over the bowler's head
a wide full-toss and KL drags the drive down to long-on for a single
fuller length delivery and angling across the left-hander - Nitish leans across and then drags the heave wide of mid-wicket; KL wanted a second; but he's sent back

cracking shot; tad too full and wide of off; turns out to be a low full-toss - KL leans across; opens the face of the bat and then places the drive square on the off-side; beats the fielder in the deep; moves into the 90s does KL. Another expensive over; 20 came off it
the boundaries keep flowing; full and at the stumps - Nitish sets up a stable base and then drills it back over the bowler's head for a boundary
yorker length delivery outside off - Nitish goes hard on the drive and squirts a thick inside edge onto the pad; rolls to the off-side and the single brings up the 150-run stand
nicely played; on a good length and angling across the right-hander - KL prods across; plays with a slightly open face and then scythes the drive past point for another boundary
a slower ball outside off - KL was a tad early into the drive and scoops it over cover-point; comes back for the second

a hundred for KL; his 6th in IPL; this has been a sparkling knock from the Indian Test opener - Jansen went full and wide of off; KL gets forward and hammers the drive straight of long-off; beats the fielder at long-off to his right
on a good length and just outside off - a punchy drive wide of cover for a single; another big over for DC; 16 came off it
the slower bouncer from Vyshak; left alone and it isn't too high; not called as a wide
clubbed; another slower ball from Vyshak; but it's too full and right in the slot - KL clears his front-leg and then hoists it high over long-on for a maximum
the slower bouncer once again; but this one drops over KL's head and is called as a wide
lovely; Vyshak switches to round the wicket; but this is a full-toss outside off - KL bends down and then plays the slog-sweep; high and behind square on the on-side for a maximum; brings up DC's 200

crunched; KL is in some mood today; another full-toss from Vyshak; he looks frazzled under this assualt from his Karnataka team-mate; offers another full-toss and it's deposited into the stands at long-off
the full-tosses keep coming and so do the boundaries; just bounced a yard in front of the ropes - KL is on a roll. Hammers the drive back over the bowler's head
another full-toss from Vyshak; whipped through mid-wicket for a single

a direct hit at the bowler's end ; but KL had made his ground. Was shaping for the reverse sweep and under-edged it to the off-side. Chahal ran across; picked the ball; turned around and threw down the stumps
Chahal floats one well wide of off; it's past the tramlines and is wided
low full-toss on ther leg-stump line; driven down to long-on for a single
loopy delivery wide of off; but it's past the tramline once again; called as a wide
very full from Chahal - KL clears his left leg and drags the drive down to long-on
Nitish comes down the pitch; takes the ball on the full and then whips it over mid-wicket for a single
slower and wider of off; swatted away through cover for a single

looked like a superb catch in the deep from Stoinis; who made a difficult chance seem simple after running across from deep backward square leg and completing the grab with a slide. Nitish Rana had miscued a full-toss down leg; failing to get the desired power or distance. The third umpire took several replays to check control of the ball and whether Stoinis had touched the boundary cushions while rolling over. In the end; it was ruled that his boot had made contact with the skirtings; so the effort went in vain and it was given as six runs to Rana
full and at the stumps; KL clears his front-leg and then hoists it high over long-off for a maximum
fuller length delivery at the stumps; KL backs away and clatters it straight to the fielder at extra-cover
the slower short ball from Jansen - KL is early into the pull; might've grazed the inside edge as it thudded into his elbow. The physio has a look
on a good length and angling across the left-hander; Nitish swings across the line and misses
short and into the pitch; hacked without any timing; behind square on the on-side for a single
clubbed; banged into the pitch by Jansen; but he's bowling to a man who was batting on 136. KL sets himself up; swivels across and then pulls it past square leg for a boundary
hammered; Bartlett continues to be expensive - goes short and looks to follow Nitish as he backed away; but the left-hander gets on top of the bounce and pulls it over square leg for a maximum
the back of the hand slower short ball down leg - Nitish waits and waits and then helps it over short fine with the pull; moves into the 90s

ball_event: out Caught by Shreyas Iyer!! A wicket
event_info: but there's hardly a smile in the Punjab camp. Nitish Rana falls in the 90s and this is a clean catch for sure - full-toss and he was backing away on the inside out drive; chipped it in the air and can't beat Shreyas Iyer - the Punjab captain moving to his right and plucking a one-handed beauty. End of a fine innings from Nitish Rana; end of a record partnership for DC; 220-run 2nd wicket stand. Nitish Rana c Shreyas Iyer b Xavier Bartlett 91(44) [4s-11 6s-4]
slower short ball outside off - Miller helps it past mid-wicket with the short-arm jab
another slower ball from Bartlett; but this is well past the tramlines and has been wided
cheeky and four; KL is playing the field now; full and well wide of off - he shuffles across; bends down low and then scoops it over square leg for a boundary
slower short ball outside off - KL backs away and carves it over point for a single. This is the highest score by a team this season
slower short ball outside off; slapped down to long-on for a single
Arshdeep keeps it full and at the stumps; driven down to long-on for a single
another slower short ball from Arshdeep; was bowled into the pitch and KL can only drag it down to long-on
yorker length delivery on off; driven down to long-on for a single

nicely played; Arshdeep saw KL shuffle across and bowled one short and into the pitch; but KL then changes his stance; waits on the ball and then runs it over the keeper's head; bounces away to the ropes and brings up his 150
full-toss on the pads; KL shuffles across and gets an inside edge on the paddle; a single to end DC's innings; they finish with 264; their highest score in the IPL
.. and Priyansh Arya is into his job. Fraction short and just outside off; he's so quick to pick the length; swivels across and then hammers the pull over mid-wicket for a maximum
good comeback from Auqib; very full and right in the blockhole - Priyansh jams the bat down and digs it out
short of a good length and at the stumps - Priyansh shuffles across and is beaten on the inside edge; came off the body and dropped to the on-side
short of a good length and just outside off - Prabhsimran went hard on the back-foot drive and skews a thick inside edge to the on-side
fuller length delivery outside off; driven in front of mid-off for a single
clubbed; fraction short and just outside off - Prabhsimran is quick to pick the length; swivels onto the front-foot and then hoists the pull over mid-wicket; went sailing over the ropes for a maximum
fuller length delivery outside off; driven square on the off-side for a single
clobbered; on a good length and just outside off - Prabhsimran shuffles across; gets under the length and then drills the drive over long-on for a maximum
Mukesh pushes one wider of off; but it's past the tramlines and has been wided

a half-chance and Auqib Nabi can't hold on; was a wide full-toss and Prabhsimran went chasing after that; sliced a thick edge to backward point's right; needed to stick as he dived full-length to his right; gets a hand and puts it down
cracking shot; slower ball on off; Prabhsimran runs down the pitch; makes room and then carves it over cover; one bounce and over the ropes
slower ball on the pads; whipped in the air and the ball bounces short of the fielder at deep square leg
this is some start from PBKS - full-toss on the pads and the local boy whips it into the stands at deep square leg. A gift and that was duly accepted
flighted delivery on the leg-stump line; nudged in front of square on the on-side for a single
Priyansh Arya is dealing in boundaries at the moment - tossed up well outside off; no one behind square on the on-side - so he reaches out and then sweeps it over square leg
Axar slows down the pace; but he's drifted it well down leg; called as a wide

a tough chance; Ngidi has made a mess of it and he's landed badly on his head. He's down and it doesn't look good - was tossed up slower and just outside off; Priyansh leant forward on the lofted drive and toe-ended it; high and towards mid-off. Ngidi back-tracked; but he never looked like taking the catch; had to stretch himself backwards and doesn't get a fingertip on it. But as he went down; he fell hard on his head and it did look nasty
tossed up on off; driven down to long-off for a single
hammered; tossed up justb outside off - Priyansh leans forward and then swings through the line; high and over long-off for a maximum
back-to-back sixes for Priyansh - tossed up and sliding down leg; he gets down low and then plays the slog-sweep; high and over backward square leg for a maximum. 20 off the over

SIX; nicely played; overpitched and at the pads; Prabhsimran gets inside the line and then wips it over deep backward square leg for a maximum. Auqib has overstepped as well. A free-hit coming up for Prabhsimran
he needs no free-hits and he doesn't miss out when offered - slower short ball; but it sits up to be smacked and Prabhsimran heaves it over square leg for a maximum
fuller length delivery on off; Prabhsimran comes down the pitch and can't beat cover with the drive
massive; the chase is up and running - Prabhsimran comes down the pitch; converts it into a half-volley and then hoists it high over long-off; almost cleared the stadium; right into the top tier
banged in short as Prabhsimran came down the pitch; but it sails high and over the batter's head; called as a wide
Auqib keeps it full and at the stumps - Prabhsimran runs down the track; almost yorked himself and squeezed it to the on-side for a single
swatted; back of a length and at the stumps - Priyansh Arya swivels across and then hammers the pull over mid-wicket; turning out to be another expensive over
low full-toss outside off - Priyansh picks out cover-point with the drive. 27 off the over
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped through mid-wicket for a single
banged in short by Natarajan; but it sails high past Priyansh; called as a wide for height
full-toss on the pads; flicked straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
nicely bowled; the yorker on leg-stump - Priyansh jams the bat down and squeezes it to short third; a fumble allows the single
the slower bouncer now; but it sails high over Prabhsimran's head; called as a wide
low full-toss from Natarajan as Prabhsimran came down the pitch; squirted towards cover-point. Priyansh Arya wanted a single and has to rush back
a wide full-toss and it has been put away; didn't come off the middle of the bat as Prabhsimran reached out; but he placed it into the gap wide of cover
Prabhsimran comes down the pitch; takes the ball on the full and bunts it in front of mid-off for a quick single
a low full-toss and Prabhsimran scythes the drive through cover-point; that's all too easy and he raises a 18-ball half-century
thumped; the slower short ball from Mukesh; but it's too short and Prabhsimran has plenty of time on the pull - rocks back and places it wide of mid-wicket
make it three in a row; Prabhsimran comes down the pitch; takes the ball on the full and then carves it over cover for a boundary

cheeky and four; Mukesh goes full and wide as Prabhsimran shuffled across - he then improvises; opens the face of the bat and then scoops it over short third; one bounce and over the ropes. Mukesh is left scratching his head
the wheels are coming off Mukesh now - a wild full-toss; Prabhsimran throws his hands on the drive; gets a thick edge and the ball flies wide of the keeper

24 off the over; Stubbs went for the catch and he can't save the boundary as well - baned in short and Prabhsimran was in no position on the pull; hit high on the bat and lobbed towards deep backward square leg. Stubbs ran in from the deep; went for the catch as he dived forward; but it bounced past him and onto the ropes
they keep leaking the boundaries; flat and down leg - Priyansh gets inside the line and tickles it fine; runs away across the fast outfield
tossed up on the leg-stump line; nudged wide of mid-wicket for a single
nicely played; Prabhsimran brings out the reverse sweep - gets down low and then gets on top of the bounce; hits it over backward point and the ball runs away to the ropes
fraction short and just outside off - punched down to long-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Sameer Rizvi!! A wicket at last
event_info: this should come as some relief for the Capitals. Was pushed through flatter and on off; Priyansh was on the front-foot as he swivelled across on the pull; hit it hard and flat; but straight down deep mid-wicket's throat. Rizvi with the catch and the blistering opening stand comes to an end. Priyansh Arya c Sameer Rizvi b Axar Patel 43(17) [4s-2 6s-5]
tossed up just outside off; punched down to long-off for a single
greets Kuldeep Yadav with a lovely cover drive! Too full from the leggie and that's a proper gift for Connolly to get going and he creamed the drive for four
full again; Connolly works it to long-on

ball_event: out Lbw!! This is just the class of KD getting the big wicket here. No pace on the ball and he just lobbed the ball into the pitch
event_info: Prabhsimran Singh went back for a pull over mid-wicket. Played way too early; ball didn't bounce much either because it didn't have pace on it. Prabhsimran finished the shot yesterday and the ball arrived today to hit him right in front of middle stump. Ball-tracker says that's smashing nothing but middle and leg. Slowed it up and got his man. End of a brilliant innings from the Punjab opener. Prabhsimran Singh lbw b Kuldeep Yadav 76(26) [4s-9 6s-5]
some turn; Shreyas carefully nudges to mid-wicket
fullish delivery; Connolly covers the line and keeps it out
turning away; driven down to long-off

I can clearly see the boundary cushion move. It is not a fair catch; says the third ump. What should have been an easy catch well inside the rope is a six now. Mukesh Kumar the fielder. Maybe carried too much speed to the left and went reverse cup style. Actually took the catch but the brakes failed he slipped. The back leg touched the boundary as he was getting up. Full and down the leg-side; Cooper Connolly goes for the slog-sweep to hand and escapes
calming drive to long-on
covers the line and keeps it out
nudges down to long-on
flatter delivery; Connolly works it to deep mid-wicket
oh off the inside half of the bat and rolling back to Axar Patel. False shot there as Shreyas was looking to push to long-off
tossed up outside off stump; Connolly drives to deep cover and gets two

sucked him into the drive and through the gate to crash into the poles. Classical KD dismissal to a leftie. Mind you this is a tiny ground; so for spinners to have it in them to toss it up against these power-hitters is an exceptional skill. Connolly didn't cover the line; stood leg-side and wanted to drive through cover; lost middle and off sticks instead. Cooper Connolly b Kuldeep Yadav 17(10) [4s-1 6s-1].
Wadhera nicely covers the line and works it to long-on
turning back in; Shreyas works it to deep square leg
flatter delivery; Wadhera manages to work it back towards the bowler
wide and full; the tease for Wadhera and he almost fell in the trap. Sharp turn away from the LHB; Wadhera wanted a proper whack over the ropes but gets beaten
oh starts with a trash ball down the leg-side! Shreyas rocks back and looks to pull; under edge goes fine past short fine leg
nudged to mid-wicket

would have been very interesting had Vipraj Nigam picked the ball cleanly. Wadhera nudged it to short mid-wicket for a quick single. Both batters were mid-pitch when the bowler tried to pick up the ball but he fumbled
fired down the leg-side
no run Axar; beautiful boy; says Stubbs as the DC skipper cuts this ball off at cover

this is so high; does it have enough? Yes! Flighted delivery right in the slot; Shreyas leans forward and lofts high over the ump and it sails towards the sightscreen. This is a good over for PBKS; they are targetting the new bowler
turning away; Shreyas guides late to backward point
smacked over mid-wicket! Poor ball from KD; short and on the pads. Shreyas says thank you very much and rocks back to muscle this over the ropes
oh a false hit and it lands well in front of deep mid-wicket. Slogged to hard and mistimed
Nehal Wadhera was shaping for a reverse sweep but Kuldeep fired it wide of off stump
short and turning away; Wadhera slaps it off the back foot to long-off
googly on the leg stump; soft nudge to mid-wicket. Oh he smartly picked the gap and Kuldeep had to mop up himself so they had ample time for two
on the leg stump; Shreyas flicks to deep mid-wicket
googly just around off stump; Wadhera drives and mistimes to cover
flatter delivery just outside off stump; tapped to deep cover
smartly bowled! He saw Nehal Wadhera move across for the fine sweep and fired it wider from the batter. Ball only went to short fine leg and they managed to pinch a quick single
on the leg stump; Shreyas nudges to deep mid-wicket
flat and on the stumps; Wadhera nudges it to long-on
wanted to back away and break-free but Axar Patel cramped him for room by following Shreyas. No run Axar. Well done boy! chirps Stubbs as the bowler stops the ball to the left
driven uppishly to cover and he's finished well; giving away just 4 runs in his final over
oh bowls a low full toss down the leg-side; Nehal Wadhera misses out on a tickle
and again! This time it's almost a yorker but spraying down the leg-side again

now he tries the wide yorker outside off stump and dishes out another full toss; Wadhera slices the drive and Chameera jumps at backward point; only to fingertip it for four. Nattu was excited for a wee bit in hope of the catch being taken

short slower ball outside off stump; Wadhera swings and misses. The square leg ump said it's not a wide when Nehal Wadhera checked with him and signalled just one bumper for the over. But Wadhera asks his captain and takes the review. It's not a wide for width but they want to check for height as well and it's take ages to get the graphic. Okay here it is; 1.85m for the head height; ball is passing at 1.96m. The ump also wants to check if the batter hit it and asks for UltraEdge and it's a flat line there. So decision overturned to wide
nudged to mid-wicket
on the leg stump; Shreyas knocks it to deep mid-wicket; calls is for two but it's not there
top edge and it flies away! Drab length ball down the leg-side. This is a really poor from Nattu. Wadhera gets inside the line and swings behind square; the ball escapes over long leg
lovely slower short ball angling away from off; driven to deep point for a single
lovely slower short ball angling away; Shreyas looks to slash and misses

in the airrrr; it's wide of Chameera and he couldn't catch the ball. Vipraj Nigam thought he had his man and seemed like it was catch for a good part but Chameera was either too wide or not quick enough to get there. The ball escaped his outstretched right hand to land just inside the rope
too full and drilled along the ground through cover for four more. This is a great cameo that is taking pressure off Shreyas Iyer at the other end

ball_event: out Caught by (sub)Karun Nair!! Taken close to the rope and Karun signals out as he feels he has caught it clean. Flighted fuller length from Vipraj Nigam
event_info: Wadhera lofts; doesn't time it well. Karun not the tallest of fielders but he did well to leap high and grab it overhead. Made sure he had proper balance on the back leg to hold his ground inside the rope. Nehal Wadhera c (sub)Karun Nair b Vipraj Nigam 25(15) [4s-3 6s-1]
yorker outside off stump; Shashank looks to swing hard and miscues
Shashank swings hard and mistimes; ball lands in front of deep cover

a massive moment in the game. Has Karun Nair dropped the match? He was so well placed and somehow lets the ball pop out of his grasp. Was the leg-break; pitched on off and spinning away from off; drags Shreyas into the big hoick and the leading edge lobs high to long-off - Karun had it under control; in and out of his grasp.
tossed up delivery on leg; Shreyas Iyer slogs it over deep backward square leg for half-a-dozen. The fielder in the deep tried to grab it; but it popped out of his hand

dropped again! Shreyas Iyer looks to go big; takes the aerial route and miscues it towards long-on. Karun Nair the culprit again - he drops another chance. Two dropped catches in successive overs; Iyer has a smile on his face. So lucky to be still out there in the middle
smashes this down the ground for a rollicking boundary does Shreyas Iyer. That's insult to injury

Delhi Capitals review for a non wide. This was given a wide by the umpire and Delhi Capitals challenge the onfield decision. This was a tossed up delivery on leg and Iyer had a wild swing at it. Doesn't make any contact as the ball misses the pad by a whisker. There's no contact; confirms UltraEdge and it's a wide; the onfield decision stays

you cannot drop Shreyas Iyer in this form. You definitely cannot drop him twice. Karun Nair might have cost DC this game. Short delivery; Shreyas rocks back and smacks this way over mid-wicket for a six
now it's a slog for a flatter hit. This is a small ground and long-on was not even in business. He wants to seal the deal for PBKS
googly angling away; Shreyas looks to cut and misses. Kuldeep collects the cap and kicks the turf in anger as he walks off
very full delivery; Shashank flicks to deep mid-wicket
it is a fair delivery as the ump feels if the batter had stood at his normal position this would have hit the leg. Good yorker from Natarajan
he's missed the yorker and bowls a full toss; Shreyas whips it away over square leg for a flat six
now it's a short of length delivery wide of off stump; Shreyas rocks back and slaps it over cover for four more and only 28 needed off 20 now
dug out for a single
edged and the ball escapes over the jumping short third fielder. Shashank went hard and got a thick edge that escaped over the fielder
pitched up by the bowler on middle and leg; Iyer flicks it towards deep square leg
whips hard and gets it off the inside half of the bat through backward square leg
yorker length ball around off; Iyer brings his bat down and squeezes it towards backward point for a single

short and punished! Picks the length early; gets into a good position and nails the pull over deep mid-wicket. 50-run stand up between Shashank and Shreyas. Shashank also making up for that dropped catch of Rahul earlier in the day
pitched up by the bowler around middle and leg; heaved through the leg-side for a single by Shashank Singh
yorker length delivery around off; the batter has squeezes it towards cover for a single. Only 13 runs required in 2 overs
they are racing away towards the target. Shuffles across in the crease and laps this full toss towards the fine leg fence
yorker length ball outside off; Shashank swings and misses
low full toss on middle and leg; the batter flicks it through mid-wicket for a single
juicy full toss by the bowler; Iyer makes the most out of it; smoking it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. One step closer to an emphatic win
drilled past the bowler for a single by Shreyas Iyer. Scores level
it's a wide outside off stump and the PBKS have pulled off the highest ever successful run chase in IPL history. Slower short delivery outside off stump; Shashank lets it pass and that's the game
